name: Quick Cabbage Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 cups shredded Chinese cabbage or green cabbage
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the shredded cabbage and sauté for 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Pour in the water and add the vegetable bouillon cube.
4. Reduce the heat to medium and simmer for an additional 8 minutes, or until the cabbage is tender.
5. Serve hot.
Per serving: 54 calories; 1 gram protein; 2 grams carbohydrates; 5 grams fat (80% of total calories); 75 milligrams calcium; 1 milligram iron; 386 milligrams sodium; 3 grams fiber
Sautéing in vegetable stock or white grape juice will significantly reduce the fat content. This recipe is vegan-friendly.
